description:
The U.S. Bureau of Reclamation needs a visual analysis of the spring snowmelt onset for the Columbia River Basin operations briefing. Create comparison plots for February, March, and April using the surface air temperature data in ~/PanoplyData/ and the briefing request at ~/Desktop/snowmelt_briefing_request.txt. Write a snowmelt timing report and ensure the visualization color scale highlights the freezing point (0°C / 273.15 K). Deliver all outputs to ~/Documents/SnowmeltPlan/."

    *   This is better. It combines the "what" and the "where" without the "First do this, then do that" feel.

    *   Wait, the original had "Using Panoply". I'll keep that if

metadata.industry: Federal Water Resource Management / Bureau of Reclamation
